tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffolding & dependencies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pip-installable package that opens a PyGame window and runs a passing smoke test.

**Files:** pyproject.toml, README.md, main.py, src/blueball/__init__.py, tests/__init__.py, tests/conftest.py, tests/test_smoke.py

**Verify:** pytest -q -> 1 passed; python main.py opens 1280x720 sky-blue window

See plan section Task 0 for full step-by-step code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml", "main.py", "src/blueball/__init__.py", "tests/test_smoke.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pip install -e .[dev] succeeds", "python main.py opens 1280x720 sky-blue window that closes on Esc", "pytest -q reports 1 passing test"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Config constants module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single config.py exposing every tunable from the spec.

**Files:** src/blueball/config.py, tests/test_smoke.py (extend)

**Verify:** pytest -q -> passes; config.PHYS_HZ == 120

See plan section Task 1 for full constant list.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/config.py", "tests/test_smoke.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all spec tunables present", "config import side-effect-free", "smoke test extended"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: World with fixed-timestep physics
tasks.description:
**Goal:** World class with deterministic fixed-substep physics loop.

**Files:** src/blueball/world.py, tests/test_world_determinism.py

**Verify:** pytest -q tests/test_world_determinism.py -v -> 4 passed

See plan section Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/world.py", "tests/test_world_determinism.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_world_determinism.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["World.step uses fixed-substep accumulator", "spiral-of-death guard", "two same-seed worlds byte-equal", "World.alpha interpolation fraction"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Camera (world<->screen math)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Camera and FollowCamera (dead-zone + lerp). Pure math, no PyGame.

**Files:** src/blueball/camera.py, tests/test_camera.py

**Verify:** pytest -q tests/test_camera.py -v -> 4 passed

See plan section Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/camera.py", "tests/test_camera.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_camera.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["world_to_screen correct", "dead-zone stillness", "lerp when target exits dead-zone"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Entity abstract base class
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Abstract Entity with bodies/shapes/update/draw interface.

**Files:** src/blueball/entities/__init__.py, src/blueball/entities/base.py, tests/test_entities.py

**Verify:** pytest -q tests/test_entities.py -v -> 2 passed

See plan section Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/entities/base.py", "tests/test_entities.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_entities.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Entity abstract with bodies/shapes/update/draw", "missing draw raises TypeError", "World calls entity.update each substep"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Agent interface, Observation/Action, HumanAgent
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Agent ABC, Action IntEnum, Observation dataclass, HumanAgent.

**Files:** src/blueball/agent.py

**Verify:** python -c "from blueball.agent import Action; print(Action.JUMP.value)" -> 3

See plan section Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/agent.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -c 'from blueball.agent import Action, HumanAgent, Observation; print(Action.JUMP)'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Action IntEnum values 0-5", "Observation frozen dataclass", "Agent ABC with reset and act", "HumanAgent reads keyboard"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Input feel layer (JumpController)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure state machine for jump buffer, coyote time, jump cut.

**Files:** src/blueball/input_feel.py, tests/test_input_feel.py

**Verify:** pytest -q tests/test_input_feel.py -v -> 7 passed

See plan section Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/input_feel.py", "tests/test_input_feel.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_input_feel.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["grounded jump fires immediately", "buffer fires on landing", "coyote allows post-walkoff jump", "cut on release while held"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Player entity
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Player wires ball body, Agent, JumpController, grounded detection.

**Files:** src/blueball/entities/player.py, tests/test_player.py

**Verify:** pytest -q tests/test_player.py -v -> 4 passed

See plan section Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/entities/player.py", "tests/test_player.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_player.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ball body with configured mass/radius/friction", "right press spins clockwise", "jump from grounded produces upward velocity", "grounded via contact normals", "die() flips alive/dead"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Collision dispatcher
tasks.description:
**Goal:** collision.register(space, world_ref) installs all v1 handlers.

**Files:** src/blueball/collision.py, tests/test_collision.py

**Verify:** pytest -q tests/test_collision.py -v -> 2 passed

See plan section Task 8.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/collision.py", "tests/test_collision.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_collision.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CT_* constants", "spike kills player", "goal completes level", "collectible collects + increments count", "patroller stomp vs side"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Static entities (Spike, Collectible, Goal)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Spike (static triangle), Collectible (sensor circle that disappears), Goal (sensor rectangle).

**Files:** src/blueball/entities/{spike,collectible,goal}.py, tests/test_entities.py (extend)

**Verify:** pytest -q tests/test_entities.py -v -> 5 passed total

See plan section Task 9.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/entities/spike.py", "src/blueball/entities/collectible.py", "src/blueball/entities/goal.py", "tests/test_entities.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_entities.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Spike CT_SPIKE static triangle", "Collectible CT_COLLECTIBLE sensor, collect() removes", "Goal CT_GOAL sensor rectangle"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Patroller entity
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Kinematic patroller walks between left_bound and right_bound.

**Files:** src/blueball/entities/patroller.py, tests/test_entities.py (extend)

**Verify:** pytest -q tests/test_entities.py -v -> 7 passed total

See plan section Task 10.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/entities/patroller.py", "tests/test_entities.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_entities.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reverses at bounds", "CT_PATROLLER", "die() removes from space"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: FallingHazard entity
tasks.description:
**Goal:** FallingHazard kinematic until player crosses trigger_x, then becomes dynamic.

**Files:** src/blueball/entities/falling_hazard.py, tests/test_entities.py (extend)

**Verify:** pytest -q tests/test_entities.py -v -> 9 passed total

See plan section Task 11.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/entities/falling_hazard.py", "tests/test_entities.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_entities.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["kinematic before trigger", "DYNAMIC after trigger", "CT_SPIKE collision_type"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Chunk system + chunk library
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Chunk ABC, CHUNK_REGISTRY, and 8 v1 chunk types.

**Files:** src/blueball/levels/__init__.py, src/blueball/levels/chunks/{__init__,base,flat,gap,stairs,bump,spike_pit,patrol_platform,falling_hazard,goal}.py, tests/test_chunks.py

**Verify:** pytest -q tests/test_chunks.py -v -> 5+ passed

See plan section Task 12.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/chunks/base.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/flat.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/gap.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/stairs.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/bump.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/spike_pit.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/patrol_platform.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/falling_hazard.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/goal.py", "tests/test_chunks.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_chunks.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Chunk ABC and CHUNK_REGISTRY", "8 chunk types registered", "each chunk's build returns width and adds expected bodies/entities"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: JSON level loader
tasks.description:
**Goal:** load_level(path, world) -> LevelMeta dataclass.

**Files:** src/blueball/levels/loader.py, tests/test_level_loader.py

**Verify:** pytest -q tests/test_level_loader.py -v -> 2 passed

See plan section Task 13.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/loader.py", "tests/test_level_loader.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_level_loader.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LevelMeta with name/spawn/colors/total_width", "chunk params as kwargs", "unknown chunk type raises ValueError"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: Renderer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Renderer drawing all entities with interpolation. Flat geometric primitives.

**Files:** src/blueball/render/__init__.py, src/blueball/render/renderer.py

**Verify:** Manual (verified during Task 15 playtest)

See plan section Task 14.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/render/renderer.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -c 'import pygame; pygame.init(); from blueball.render.renderer import Renderer; print(chr(111)+chr(107))'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all draw_* methods", "begin_frame snapshots prev positions", "ball spin via rotated dark arc", "static segments drawn"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: PlayScene + tutorial level + manual playtest
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire it all together. Playable v1 vertical slice.

**Files:** src/blueball/scenes/__init__.py, src/blueball/scenes/base.py, src/blueball/scenes/play.py, src/blueball/levels/tutorial_hill.json, main.py

**Verify:** python main.py opens playable level; pytest -q all pass; manual feel check

See plan section Task 15.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/scenes/base.py", "src/blueball/scenes/play.py", "src/blueball/levels/tutorial_hill.json", "main.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["playable level end-to-end", "movement+jumping responsive", "spike resets, goal completes", "ball spins, camera smooth", "manual feel pass"]}
```
